articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: Meta reportedly considering layoffs that could affect 20% of the company - TechCrunch
articles.description: These layoffs could help Facebook's parent company offset its aggressive spending on AI infrastructure, as well as AI-related acquisitions and hiring.
articles.content:
Meta is considering major layoffs that could affect 20% or more of the companys workforce, according to Reuters.
